title: Pass 5.B.2: ferrotorch-train clip_grad_norm_/clip_grad_value_/EmaCallback CPU readback
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-train audit, GPU_CPU_MISMATCH bucket (3 findings).

- src/grad_utils.rs:81-86,142-149 — clip_grad_norm_ calls grad.data_vec()? then rebuilds Tensor::from_storage(TensorStorage::cpu(...)). Silently moves CUDA gradients to CPU.
- src/grad_utils.rs:198-214 — clip_grad_value_ same pattern.
- src/callback.rs:328-362 — EmaCallback::init_from_params/update_from_params casts every param to f64 and stores in Vec<Vec<f64>>; runs decay/update in scalar f64 in a Rust loop regardless of T or device.

Hot training-loop ops with mandatory CPU detour. Acceptance:
- Migrate to device-resident clamp/norm ops, OR
- Provide foreach-style flag with explicit err on default CPU path for CUDA params
- Discriminating test asserting grad.is_cuda() preserved across clip_grad_norm_.
